raw_consumer_statement:
Im writing to file a complaint about my experience with Citi bank on my citi bank credit card on XX/XX/XXXX. I had a transaction with a merchant where the goods I received were counterfeit. I reached out to the bank within the required timeframe to file a chargeback claim to this transaction. 

I received a notification on my email XX/XX/XXXX that I will be sent a letter requesting more information. I never received this letter. I received another email on XX/XX/XXXX that the dispute was closed due to them not receiving the letter back ( the letter I never received ). 

I called that same day to reopen the dispute, and was reassured by the representative that since I havent received the letter, Ill be able to continue the dispute. On XX/XX/XXXX, I received another notification that another letter was sent. I was able to respond to it in a timely manner with all of the requested information, and call to confirm they received it. 

On XX/XX/XXXX, I received another email saying my dispute investigation was completed, and it was ruled against me due to there having been too much time passed since the transaction ( no acknowledgement of the reopening of the dispute or the first letter not received ). I called the same day to explain the situation, where the representative agreed with me that the dispute was initiated within the allowed time window and that shed reopen it and request an escalation if necessary. 

On XX/XX/XXXX, I received another email, with the letter being identical to the one received on XX/XX/XXXX. I split the transaction on this purchase over 5 different credit cards. All of the other cards were able to resolve this identical dispute in my favor, citi just refuses to take responsibility for their failure to send the letter and handle my dispute the way they should.
